q: Automated technical debt auditing for startups
diagnostic: Technical debt is not just code — it is undocumented decisions, tribal processes, and key-person dependencies. A boardroom with The Digital Vanguard and Capital Steward agents audits this holistically, not just the repository.
answer: Technical debt is not just code — it is undocumented decisions, tribal processes, and key-person dependencies. A boardroom with The Digital Vanguard and Capital Steward agents audits this holistically, not just the repository.
description: Operational debt exposure — tribal knowledge, undocumented dependencies, spaghetti logic. One bad due diligence report kills a nine-figure deal.
symptom: A potential lead investor asks a deep question about infrastructure integrity, and the founder has to wait three days for an answer.
